name: driftAlerts
_note: Read-only wrapper over the real lattice drift-monitor (lazy-imported, pure in-process read of the live STATE drift store — no network/LLM). On a fresh/empty corpus it returns ok:true with an empty alerts[] and total:0 — never no_db (the drift store lives in STATE, not the DB). 'limit' is a fail-CLOSED numeric guard (poisoned → ok:false invalid_limit). If the drift-monitor is not loadable it returns ok:false drift_monitor_unavailable — never a fabricated success.
